beats.narration: Neutron radiography images live ordnance, so you handle detonators. The ignition source you make all day, that fires them, is static.

payload.title: THE SPARK YOU CAN'T FEEL
payload.sub: It can still fire a detonator.

beats.narration: Just moving charges your body to tens of thousands of volts. Dry air makes it worse. You feel nothing below three thousand.
And sensitive initiators fire at a fraction of a millijoule, far below the smallest spark you can feel. Comfort tells you nothing.

payload.sub: The most sensitive initiators ignite below human perception.

beats.narration: The defense is potential control. Bonding ties objects together; grounding drains them to earth. Wrist strap, floor, footwear, shunted leads, one potential.
Dress as part of the system. Cotton outer layers, no synthetics, never change clothes in the area. And always: minimum people, explosives, time.

payload.heading: You are part of the system

chips.s: Removing a layer is a static generator
